numerator: unique evidence IDs cited by diagnostics or recommendations that occur in the record's preregistered non-not_reported probe key
denominator: unique evidence IDs in the record's preregistered non-not_reported probe key
unsupported_claim_proxy: cited evidence IDs outside the reference set are reported separately and are not automatically classified as false
interpretation: limited evidence-checklist recovery proxy; not semantic answer accuracy, failure-mode completeness, or a gold standard
missing_or_invalid_output: exclude from paired effect estimate and report as a structured-output failure; never score as zero
key_revision_policy: no changes after production generation begins; any change requires a new protocol hash and run ID
